creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Your patch is definitely better than my patch.
HINTING option is not scope of this PR,
but I'm appreciate it.

It seems your patch deletes `files/patch-conf.d_Makefile.in`.
If it's intended,
please `svn rm files/patch-conf.d_Makefile.in` before making a patch.
It will help committer's work.
